title: Term Sheet Logic Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger term sheet logic foundations judgment so capital / fundraising work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Term Sheet Logic Foundations is a leverage point inside capital / fundraising. It supports the broader goal of fundraising, capital allocation, investor relations, and financial strategy.
coreConcepts: Term Sheet Logic Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good term sheet logic foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Term Sheet Logic Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
